title: Built a book tracker in Notion with a Quotes database and Reading Sessions log
body:
I kept finishing books and then forgetting everything about them. Needed something more than a list with star ratings.

Built this template with three databases:

- Books — status (Want to Read / Reading / Done / Abandoned), rating, genre, format, dates, page count, My Takeaway (one sentence on what I'll do differently), recommendation
- Quotes — save highlights with book relation, page number and tags: Wisdom / Actionable / Surprising / Motivating / Warning
- Reading Sessions — each time I sit down: date, pages read, minutes spent, mood (Focused / Inspired / Distracted / Tired), notes

The part I find most useful: the Quotes database filtered by "Actionable" tags. Those are the quotes that actually changed my behavior.

Free Notion plan works. Free to download.

→ https://tinycraft.gumroad.com/l/ienuys

title: Notion Book Tracker — Books, Quotes, Reading Sessions & Annual Challenge
description: Track every book you read in Notion. Save quotes with page numbers and tags. Log reading sessions with mood tracking. Know your actual reading habits. #notiontemplate #booklist #readingtracker #bookworm #selfimprovement

title: Save every highlight that matters — Notion book tracker with Quotes database
description: Stop losing your best book quotes. Log them with page numbers, tags (Wisdom / Actionable / Surprising) and the book they came from. Filter by "Actionable" to find quotes that tell you what to actually do. #bookquotes #notion #readinglist #productivity
